error_signature: JWT verification fails with exp claim
title: JWT verification fails due to incorrect exp claim setup
symptom: The JWT verification fails when using the exp claim set as a duration instead of a timestamp. The verification succeeds when using the Expires In option but fails with the exp JSON setup.
applies_when: Setting exp claim in JSON format
not_this_if: Using Expires In option for JWT
root_cause: The exp claim in JWT should be a timestamp indicating the exact expiration time, not a duration from the issued time. When the exp claim is set incorrectly, the verification fails as the token is considered valid beyond its intended expiration.
fix_steps: Calculate the correct exp timestamp based on the issued at (iat) time.
Set the exp claim in the JWT to this calculated timestamp.
agent_instruction: Calculate the exp timestamp and update the JWT accordingly before verification.
